svg.title: Spreadsheet-Native Purchase Orders

g.text: The PO queue stays dominant while the selected document, supplier context, and PO Receiving handoff remain visibly adjacent.

svg.text: Queue view keeps the operational columns visible while status changes and PO Receiving launch remain explicit row-scoped actions.
Queue stays width-disciplined at 1440px. Supplier setup and PO Receiving launch are adjacent support, not the main sheet.
The selected purchase order opens beside the queue so users can adjust lines without leaving the primary conveyor.
Line edits stay in-grid; supplier notes and PO Receiving launch remain adjacent support.
Visible adjacency means the next owner is always obvious: PO Receiving is a pinned CTA, not a hidden inspector-only link.
Supplier notes, ETA proof, and PO Receiving launch remain visible beneath the selected PO instead of drifting into a modal-only detail flow.
One compact support band keeps spend, supplier concentration, and ownership handoffs visible without stealing width from the main queue.

g.text: 6 POs in focus · 2 PO Receiving handoffs
Selected PO-2198 · Enter open · Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+R open PO receiving
Supplier setup stays adjacent. Intake and supplier payment execution remain separate owners.
